description: A tab definition used exclusively inside TabView children. Not rendered standalone; defines the tab label and content.

content.description: Single child view shown when this tab is selected

systemImage.description: SF Symbol name for the tab icon

assetImage.description: Asset catalog image name for the tab icon

materialName.description: (Android only; author as materialName:android) Material Symbol name, the Android stand-in for systemImage

materialWeight.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'wght' axis, 100..700; defaults to 400

materialFill.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'FILL' axis, 0..1 (or boolean); defaults to 0

materialGrade.description: (Android only) Material Symbols 'GRAD' axis, -50..200; defaults to 0

materialSize.description: (Android only) explicit icon size in sp; defaults to the nav-bar icon size

badge.description: Badge shown on the tab; integer count or string; capped at '99+' for integers > 99
